metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — WA
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties.

notes.tax_rate_format: Rate per $100 of assessed value unless otherwise noted.
notes.scope: Initial release covers counties with major military installations from states in state-benefits.json.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates typically set annually by county boards.

income_thresholds.benefit: Exempt from excess levies + frozen value + reduced rate
Exempt from excess levies + frozen value

income_based_exemption.eligibility: 100% P&T disabled veteran of any age, or age 61+ with disability

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T or IU disabled veteran; WA resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Washington provides full property tax exemption for 100% P&T or IU disabled veterans (RCW 84.36.379). Pierce County: ~$440,000 median home at 1.05% rate = ~$4,620/yr savings.

property_tax._note: Major Navy submarine base. WA rates expressed per $1,000 of assessed value. Rates vary by tax code area.

income_based_exemption.eligibility: Veterans with 80%+ service-connected disability rating; income-based

income_tiers.benefit: Exempt from all excess levies + frozen value
Partial exemption from regular and excess levies

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T or IU disabled veteran; WA resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Washington provides full property tax exemption for 100% P&T or IU disabled veterans (RCW 84.36.379). Kitsap County: ~$460,000 median home at 0.99% rate = ~$4,554/yr savings.
